subject: FW: Nobel Faces Book Party - November 15
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Meg Rand [mailto:rand@seedmediagroup.com] 
Sent: Friday, October 26, 2007 3:53 PM
To: Meg Rand
Subject: Nobel Faces Book Party - November 15

On behalf of Adam Bly, please find attached an invitation to a book
party honoring Seed Contributing Photographer Peter Badge's 'Nobel
Faces: A Gallery of Nobel Prize Winners'.

We hope that you can make it.


All the best,
Meg.



Meg Rand
Executive Assistant to Adam Bly
CEO and Editor-in-Chief
Seed Media Group
12 West 21st Street, 7th Floor
New York, NY 10010

T / 646-502-7051
F / 646-502-7040

www.seedmediagroup.com
www.seedmagazine.com
www.scienceblogs.com
